issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: setup-go-microservice-with-doppler
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes the required commands and CI export note, though the max‑age value is incorrect, whereas Response A omits the setup, upload flags, token options, and CI export entirely.

scenarios.name: docker-compose-with-doppler-secrets
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit the required --no-file and --format docker flags and do not demonstrate the named pipe or env-file syntax specified in the rubric.
